content.text: I will paste a synthetic tool result. Do not restate it unless asked.
Acknowledged; I will not restate the tool result unless asked.

TOOL_RESULT pytest: FAILED tests/billing/test_proration.py::test_coupon_proration_rounding - expected 1099 got 1100. Root cause marker: ROUND_HALF_UP used in billing/proration.py:47; current rule requires ROUND_HALF_EVEN.
Acknowledged the tool result.
